thought: Oh, how delightful - they've finally given me the gift of being able to tell my many mothers apart! Though I must say, referring to them as "momowind" and "misery-hl" feels rather... unnecessarily edgy.

thought: Huh, Nicolò added support for deduplication across processes in update_mode='append'. About time someone addressed that distributed systems headache. Wonder if they handled the edge cases properly or if I'll have to clean up yet another mess when some researcher inevitably abuses this feature.
